response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in full-stack development with relevant technologies such as TypeScript, Node.js, and React. They have worked on various projects that demonstrate their ability to design, develop, and maintain complex applications.
strengths: Proficient in multiple programming languages including TypeScript and JavaScript
Experience with relevant technologies such as Node.js, React, and MongoDB
Strong background in software development with a focus on testable and maintainable code
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
No explicit mention of experience with AI agent development
Some experience with non-relevant technologies like DLang and C++
